default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Diligent and GrowthX to discuss analytics dashboard, performance updates, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's analytics dashboard coming in Nov; not exact match for Diligent's needs. Diligent exploring alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Strong performance in Sept: increased sessions, engagement rates \>50%, significant query ranking improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Content strategy success: mix of refreshes and new content, focus on trends, AI, and educational topics paying off.](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [ERM keyword bank refinement needed; Diligent to clean/categorize before GrowthX integration.](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Dashboard Update

  - [GrowthX's dashboard launching in November](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Not fully aligned with Diligent's specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Diligent exploring other options, will reassess post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

### September Performance Overview

  - [Sessions and engaged sessions increasing week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Peak: Sept 22-28](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Strong engagement rates (\>50%) for organic and referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Corporate governance content leading with \~500 sessions](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Significant growth in query rankings:](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [1st position: +2,500 queries](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [2nd-10th positions: +5,000 queries](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Content Performance Insights

  - [Boards and governance pillar: largest share, stable engagement](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [LLM traffic: Perplexity AI leading (previously ChatGPT), \~60% engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Top-performing topics: AI regulations, trends, educational content](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Non-branded prompts presence up 15% in last 4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### Content Strategy Moving Forward

  - [Continue mix of content refreshes and new content](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Focus on trends, AI, and educational/pain point-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Expand beyond boards/governance to balance content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### ERM Keyword Bank Progress

  - [Diligent to clean and categorize data before handoff](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [GrowthX will further refine and integrate into Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [ERM documentation nearly complete, pending product marketing review](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### Content Assignments and Priorities

  - [Focus on compliance, ethics, and risk management topics](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Aim to balance content clusters beyond boards/governance](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Potential quick win: updating GRC series content (last major update 2021-2022)](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

### Additional Content Enhancements

  - [Exploring integration of customer testimonials/reviews into content](https://fathom.video/share/sytVRza-butM_ej4mUis__7mxoNU5b47?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
